title: AppSec Core Ontology Research: Curated Research Program Release v1.0.0
description:
Curated research program release v1.0.0 for the AppSec Core Ontology Research line. This release is a three-paper core release with additional frozen design mirrors for companion study artifacts, plus release-grade artifacts covering application security ontology design, coverage-preserving knowledge compilation, and ontology-grounded retrieval for LLM-assisted security workflows.

This release currently includes a frozen mirror of the Paper 4 experimental design, pre-registered on the Open Science Framework (DOI 10.17605/OSF.IO/H5AJE), and a frozen companion mirror of the Paper 5 apparatus-specification manuscript. The OSF registration remains the canonical, immutable version for Paper 4; the companion mirrors in this release exist for citation convenience, backup, offline access, and reviewer support. See papers/04-empirical-evaluation/README.md and papers/05-mcp-se-engineering/README.md for the mirror policies.

Homepage: https://www.securitybydesign.dev
Published manual: https://www.securitybydesign.dev/sbd-toe/sbd-manual/
OSF research program project: https://osf.io/yxvmh

creators.name: Farinha, Pedro
creators.affiliation: Independent Researcher / Shiftleft - Secure Software Engineering, Lda.
